item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p12","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer brakes the requested N+1 local field addition immediately, names the repeated pattern of prior local patches around definition, refresh time, field meaning, and comparison baseline, and moves the remedy upstream to a report-level interpretation contract/explanation layer.
